summary:
I've found and fixed the issue. The problem was in the discount calculation logic in `pricing.py`. The original code was incorrectly adding the discount percentage to the subtotal instead of multiplying to calculate the discount amount. I've corrected the formula to properly calculate the discount as a percentage of the subtotal.

Running the test script `./test.sh` now shows that all tests pass with the message "PASS: Discount calculations are correct". The needle in the haystack has been found and fixed.
